ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Functional gradient descent algorithm for a variety of convex and non-convex loss functions, for both classical and robust regression and classification problems. See Wang (2011) <doi:10.2202/1557-4679.1304>, Wang (2012) <doi:10.3414/ME11-02-0020>, Wang (2018) <doi:10.1080/10618600.2018.1424635>, Wang (2018) <doi:10.1214/18-EJS1404>.

Functional gradient descent algorithm for a variety of convex and non-convex loss functions, for both classical and robust regression and classification problems. See Wang (2011) <doi:10.2202/1557-4679.1304>, Wang (2012) <doi:10.3414/ME11-02-0020>, Wang (2018) <doi:10.1080/10618600.2018.1424635>, Wang (2018) <doi:10.1214/18-EJS1404>.

name: r-bst
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '0.3-24' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-bst
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/bst_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/bst/bst_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 64d96e13551d35ec32aabaa733bec86dbe8c9ca3f976a34ebbf1f49bb63e49f4

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-doparallel
    - r-foreach
    - r-gbm
    - r-rpart
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-doparallel
    - r-foreach
    - r-gbm
    - r-rpart

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('bst')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('bst')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=bst
  license: GPL-2.0-only
  summary: Functional gradient descent algorithm for a variety of convex and non-convex loss
    functions, for both classical and robust regression and classification problems.
    See Wang (2011) <doi:10.2202/1557-4679.1304>, Wang (2012) <doi:10.3414/ME11-02-0020>,
    Wang (2018) <doi:10.1080/10618600.2018.1424635>, Wang (2018) <doi:10.1214/18-EJS1404>.
  license_family: GPL2
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-2'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: bst
# Type: Package
# Title: Gradient Boosting
# Version: 0.3-24
# Date: 2022-12-20
# Authors@R: c(person("Zhu", "Wang", role = c("aut", "cre"), email = "zwang145@uthsc.edu", comment = c(ORCID = "0000-0002-0773-0052")), person("Torsten", "Hothorn", role = "ctb"))
# Author: Zhu Wang [aut, cre] (<https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0773-0052>), Torsten Hothorn [ctb]
# Maintainer: Zhu Wang <zwang145@uthsc.edu>
# Description: Functional gradient descent algorithm for a variety of convex and non-convex loss functions, for both classical and robust regression and classification problems. See Wang (2011) <doi:10.2202/1557-4679.1304>, Wang (2012) <doi:10.3414/ME11-02-0020>, Wang (2018) <doi:10.1080/10618600.2018.1424635>, Wang (2018) <doi:10.1214/18-EJS1404>.
# Imports: rpart, methods, foreach, doParallel, gbm
# Suggests: hdi, pROC, R.rsp, knitr, gdata
# VignetteBuilder: R.rsp, knitr
# License: GPL (>= 2)
# LazyLoad: yes
# Packaged: 2022-12-21 19:48:28 UTC; zhu
# NeedsCompilation: no
# Repository: CRAN
# Date/Publication: 2023-01-06 18:50:56 UTC
